metadata.name: minebtc
metadata.description: MineBTC — Faction warfare game on Solana with betting, staking, NFTs, and deflationary tokenomics

instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: Accept a proposed authority transfer (step 2). Only the pending authority can call.

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: The new authority (must match pending_authority)

instructions.name: add_collection_delegate
docs: Add an UpdateDelegate to the collection (admin only)
Allows delegate wallet to sign for marketplace verification without
transferring the update authority (which would break minting)

instructions.name: add_faction
docs: Add a single faction to the global config (admin only)

instructions.name: add_lp_and_burn
docs: INSTRUCTION 2b: Add liquidity and burn LP tokens (called after update_rate)
When lp_token_amount > 0: Admin override mode (requires authority signature)
When lp_token_amount = 0: Automatic calculation mode (anyone can call)

accounts.name: global_game_state
docs: Read-only: provides `current_round_id` so we can snapshot the cycle's
final round when the LP op crosses the war's settle threshold.

accounts.name: war_config
docs: Mut: this ix writes `cycle_end_round_id` once the lp threshold crosses.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority (optional - only required when lp_token_amount > 0)

accounts.name: raydium_program
docs: `raydium_cp_swap::ID` so a malicious program can't receive our CPI
(which signs with the `authority_pda` PDA) and drain program-owned
token accounts via authority_pda's signer privilege.

accounts.name: dbtc_token_account
docs: MINE_BTC token vault

accounts.name: sol_token_account
docs: SOL token account for LP addition. **Must be the canonical WSOL ATA
owned by `authority_pda`** — without this binding, a caller could pass
an attacker-owned WSOL account and siphon the earmarked
`buybacks_account.sol_for_pol` through the early-return path (e.g. by
also passing a zero-balance `sol_vault`). With the constraint, any
SOL transferred here is held under `authority_pda`'s signer authority
and is recovered to `buybacks_sol_vault` by the trailing close at the
end of this ix. SnapshotPrice init-if-needs this exact ATA, so it will
exist by the time the first LP burn fires.

accounts.name: sol_mint
docs: — same rationale as `SnapshotPrice::sol_mint`.

instructions.name: add_ticket_tier_config
docs: Add or update ticket tier configs (admin only)
Max 3 ticket tier configs can be set

instructions.name: admin_mint_hashbeast
docs: Admin function to mint a HashBeast NFT for free to a specified recipient (admin only)
Allows the admin to mint a HashBeast NFT without payment.
The NFT is minted directly to the specified recipient address.
# Parameters
- `recipient`: Address that will receive the minted NFT
- `faction_id`: Faction ID the hashbeast belongs to

accounts.name: player_data
docs: Player data account for the recipient (for ticket distribution)

accounts.name: hashbeast_asset
docs: Metaplex Core asset (will be created)

accounts.name: hashbeast_collection
docs: Collection account for the HashBeast. Address-pinned to the official
Core collection recorded in `hashbeast_config.hashbeast_collection`
— without this binding, callers could mint NFT assets outside the
canonical collection, breaking identity / royalties / marketplace
gating. Kept `Option` (rather than required) only to preserve the
existing SDK signature; mint handlers add a runtime `require!(...)`
that the collection is present.

instructions.name: batch_mint_hashbeasts
docs: Batch mint multiple HashBeast (anyone can call, max 10 per transaction)
Mints multiple HashBeast NFTs in a single transaction.
Each hashbeast uses bonding curve pricing based on the current supply at mint time.
# Parameters
- `faction_id`: Faction ID all hashbeasts belong to
- `mint_count`: Number of hashbeasts to mint (1-10)
- `ticket_tier_index`: Ticket tier index (0-2)

accounts.name: multisig_wsol_account
docs: Multisig WSOL token account (destination for WSOL transfers)
MUST be owned by global_config.fee_recipient (the multisig address)

accounts.name: user_wsol_account
docs: User's WSOL token account (for wrapping SOL to WSOL)

accounts.name: referrer_rewards
docs: Optional only when the minter has no referrer.
Referred minters must provide the canonical referrer's ReferralRewards PDA.

instructions.name: breed_hashbeasts
docs: Breed two hashbeasts to create offspring

accounts.name: hashbeast_mint_config
docs: account validator under the BPF stack limit.

accounts.name: player_data
docs: deserializing the full PlayerData account in the generated validator.

accounts.name: floor_history
docs: account validator under the BPF stack limit.

accounts.name: hashbeast_collection
docs: `hashbeast_config.hashbeast_collection` to keep generated account
validation below the SBF stack ceiling.

instructions.name: buy_user_listing
docs: Permissionless wrapper around `degenbtc_market::buy_listing`. Records
a real-demand sale to `SaleHistory` if it qualifies (user-to-user,
listing >= 5 minutes old).

instructions.name: cancel_authority_transfer
docs: Cancel a pending authority transfer. Only current authority can call.

instructions.name: cancel_user_listing
docs: User cancels their own listing; floor queue entry (if any) is removed.

instructions.name: claim_autominer_rewards
docs: Claim autominer rewards with auto-reload (keeper instruction)
Uses SOL rewards to add more rounds to autominer, leftover SOL goes to owner

accounts.name: autominer_vault
docs: Autominer vault to reload

accounts.name: user_game_bet
docs: User game bet account - will be closed

accounts.name: caller
docs: Caller (backend script)

accounts.name: hashbeast_metadata
docs: Optional HashBeastMetadata account for syncing mutation

accounts.name: war_state
docs: Cycle state for the round being claimed. Address pinned via seeds keyed
by `game_session.war_id_when_played`.

accounts.name: user_war_bets

to `autominer_vault.owner` + the cycle id on `game_session`.

accounts.name: lootbox_queue
docs: Country lootbox queue for the autominer owner's home faction.

accounts.name: lootbox_claim
docs: handler either verifies the existing program-owned `LootboxClaim` data or
lazily creates it only after a winning loser-roll lands.

instructions.name: claim_faction_treasury_for_faction_war
docs: DONE -::- Claim faction treasury rewards for a settled faction_war.
Uses the gameplay-score leaderboard (faction_war final_ranks) -- permissionless.

instructions.name: claim_lootbox_nft
docs: Permissionless. Delivers a reserved loser-roll hashbeast to the recorded
winner. Signer may be the user or a cranker bot.

accounts.name: lootbox_claim
docs: Reservation PDA, closed on success. Rent goes to the cranker as the
delivery incentive; the NFT recipient remains fixed by `lootbox_claim.user`.

accounts.name: reborn_entry
docs: RebornEntry for the dropped asset, closed on success.

accounts.name: hashbeast_metadata
docs: HashBeast metadata, read for rebirth generation emitted to indexers.

accounts.name: hashbeast_config
docs: Read-only config that pins the canonical HashBeast collection.

accounts.name: hashbeast_collection
docs: Option wrapper is only for mpl-core builder compatibility; handler
requires Some and Anchor address-checks it against HashBeastConfig.

instructions.name: claim_referral_rewards
docs: Claim referral rewards (SOL earned from referrals)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Referrer claiming rewards

instructions.name: claim_round_rewards
docs: Claim rewards for a user after round ends

accounts.name: global_game_state
docs: Global game state (for current round entropy)

accounts.name: caller
docs: Caller (bot or user themselves)

accounts.name: hashbeast_metadata
docs: Optional HashBeastMetadata account for syncing mutation

accounts.name: war_state
docs: Cycle state for the round being claimed. Address is pinned via seeds
keyed by `game_session.war_id_when_played`.

accounts.name: user_war_bets
docs: Per-user, per-cycle bets PDA. Address pinned via seeds keyed by the
claiming user + the cycle id stored on `game_session`. Lazily created
by `join_bets` (the first bet of the cycle); claim ixs read+mutate the
already-existing account.

accounts.name: lootbox_queue
docs: Country lootbox queue for the player's home faction. Read on every
claim; mutated when a losing player's roll wins a slot.

accounts.name: lootbox_claim
docs: handler either verifies the existing program-owned `LootboxClaim` data or
lazily creates it only after a winning loser-roll lands.

instructions.name: claim_staking_rewards
docs: Claim staking rewards: transfers SOL directly, accumulates degenBTC to pending

accounts.name: user_dbtc_account
docs: User's degenBTC token account to receive staking rewards

accounts.name: authority
docs: User claiming rewards (must be player_data.owner)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program for SPL-22 token operations

instructions.name: claim_war_rewards
docs: User claims their faction-war rewards (closes user_war_bets account).

instructions.name: close_faction_war_accounts
docs: Close a fully claimed historical faction-war cycle.

instructions.name: close_game_session
docs: Close a settled round session once all user bet accounts have claimed.

instructions.name: crank_distribute_tax
docs: DONE -::- STEP 2: Withdraw total tax from mint and distribute it
Callable by anyone - program-controlled withdraw authority

instructions.name: crank_harvest_fees
docs: DONE -::- STEP 1: Harvest fees from user token accounts to the mint
Callable by anyone - keeper bot should call this in batches

instructions.name: create_hashbeast_collection
docs: Create HashBeast collection with program PDA as authority (admin only)
Creates a new Metaplex Core collection for HashBeast NFTs.
The collection's update authority is set to a program-controlled PDA,
allowing the program to mint NFTs from the collection.
Requires HashBeastConfig to be initialized first.

instructions.name: deposit_dbtc_tokens
docs: Deposit degenBTC tokens to the mining vault (anyone can call)
Allows anyone to deposit degenBTC tokens into the mining vault.
These tokens will be distributed as rewards to stakers over time.

instructions.name: distribute_sol_fees
docs: Withdraw collected SOL fees from the treasury (anyone can call)
Withdraws SOL from the treasury and distributes it according to configured percentages:
- Protocol fee percentage
- Buyback percentage (for token buybacks)
- Stakers percentage (distributed to stakers)
The remaining amount goes to the fee recipient (dev earnings).

accounts.name: treasury_wsol_account
docs: Treasury's WSOL token account (authority is treasury PDA)
Initialized automatically if it doesn't exist (payer pays for initialization)

accounts.name: multisig_wsol_account
docs: Multisig WSOL token account (destination for WSOL transfers)
MUST be owned by global_config.fee_recipient (the multisig address)

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: caller can't pass a fake mint, drive `treasury_wsol_account` ATA-init at
a different mint and silently divert dev-earnings into an attacker ATA.
(sync_native already would catch this on the SPL side, but constraining
here fails earlier with a clearer error and removes the foot-gun.)

accounts.name: inventory_sweep_vault
docs: `nft_market_making_pct` slice of distributed SOL fees.

accounts.name: buybacks_account
docs: Buybacks tracking account (required)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer for account initialization (can be anyone calling this keeper function)

instructions.name: end_round
docs: DONE -::- Finalize the current round using scheduled slot-hash entropy.

instructions.name: execute_autominer_bet
docs: Execute autominer bet (keeper instruction)

accounts.name: user_game_bet
docs: UserGameBet PDA for autominer bets (aggregates all bets from this vault for this round)

accounts.name: user_war_bets
docs: Per-user, per-cycle bets PDA for the autominer's owner. Created lazily
on the owner's first autominer-driven bet of the cycle (init_if_needed).
Cranker (`caller`) pays rent.

accounts.name: referrer_rewards
docs: Referrer's commission account. Required when the autominer's owner has a referrer.
SDK derives `[REFERRAL_REWARDS_SEED, player_data.referral_code]`.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Caller (bot or anyone) - doesn't need to be owner

instructions.name: expire_program_listing
docs: Permissionless. Cancels a stale program-owned listing (>= 7 days old)
and re-runs the disposition cascade with progressive expire-discount.

accounts.name: reborn_entry
docs: load/store/close avoids the `Account<T>` Drop-guard re-serialize panic
on the burn paths (where we close the account before exit).

accounts.name: lootbox_queue
docs: Country lootbox queue for the asset's faction. Seed validated against
the entry's faction_id inside the handler (we deserialize manually).

instructions.name: get_gene_breakdown
docs: Query function to decode DNA and return gene breakdown
This is a read-only function that can be called via simulateTransaction

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program (required by Anchor but not used)

instructions.name: handle_inventory_proceeds
docs: Permissionless. Splits accrued inventory sale proceeds 50/50 between
sweep vault and sol_treasury.

instructions.name: init_autominer
docs: Initialize autominer vault with flexible faction-direction configuration
use_ticket: Optional ticket tier index. If Some, autominer uses tickets instead of SOL for bets.

instructions.name: init_hashbeast_royalties
docs: Initialize royalties on the HashBeast collection (admin only)

instructions.name: init_inventory_pool
docs: Admin one-shot: initialize inventory pool, floor queue, sale history,
floor history, and the inventory sweep vault. Caches the marketplace
program + config pubkeys for CPI validation on every subsequent ix.

accounts.name: floor_queue
docs: materializing the large fixed array in the generated validator.

accounts.name: sale_history
docs: materializing the large fixed array in the generated validator.

instructions.name: init_lootbox_queue
docs: Admin one-shot per faction. Creates the country's `LootboxQueue` PDA.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the global program configuration
This function can only be called once as it creates the program's configuration accounts
It will fail if the accounts already exist

instructions.name: initialize_custodian_accounts
docs: Initialize both custodian token accounts (admin only)
Initializes:
- MINEBTC custodian: Token-2022 account that holds all staked MINE_BTC tokens (global for all factions)
- Liquidity custodian: Standard SPL Token account that holds all staked LP tokens (global for all factions)

accounts.name: dbtc_custodian
docs: degenBTC custodian token account (Token-2022) - PDA owned by dbtc_custodian_authority

accounts.name: liquidity_custodian
docs: Liquidity custodian token account (standard SPL Token) - PDA owned by liquidity_custodian_authority

instructions.name: initialize_faction_war
docs: DONE -::- Initialize a new faction war state PDA.
Must be called once per war cycle before the first round's settle_round.
Permissionless — anyone can initialize the war state for the current war ID.

instructions.name: initialize_game_state
docs: Initialize the global game state (admin only)
Sets up the GlobalGameState account that tracks game rounds, betting, and rewards.
This must be called before any rounds can be started.

instructions.name: initialize_hashbeast_config
docs: Initialize HashBeastConfig account (admin only).
Creates the HashBeastConfig that stores collection + breeding state. There
is no lifetime supply cap; only the genesis sale (HashBeastMintConfig) is
bounded.

instructions.name: initialize_hashbeast_mint_config
docs: Initialize mint-only HashBeast config for the genesis sale.

instructions.name: initialize_hashpower_config
docs: Initialize HashpowerConfig account (admin only)

instructions.name: initialize_mining
docs: Initialize mining by setting the token vault and emission rate.
Can only be called once. Mining start time is recorded from the on-chain clock.

instructions.name: initialize_player
docs: DONE -::- Initialize a player account for the DegenBTC country arena

accounts.name: referrer_rewards
docs: Optional only when no referral code is supplied.
If a referral code is provided, this account must be the canonical referrer's
ReferralRewards PDA and is validated in the instruction handler.

instructions.name: initialize_system_accounts
docs: Initialize system referral account and buybacks system (admin only)

accounts.name: system_referral_rewards
docs: Reserved sentinel referral rewards PDA for users who register without a referrer

accounts.name: buybacks_account
docs: Buybacks tracking account (admin only)

instructions.name: initialize_tax_config
docs: Initialize TaxConfig account and create vault token accounts (admin only).
NFT market making is no longer funded from this tax — it pulls SOL from
`distribute_sol_fees` (see `SolFeeConfig::nft_market_making_pct`).

instructions.name: initialize_war_config
docs: Initialize faction_war configuration (admin only).
FactionWar duration is tied to the economy cycle -- one faction_war per LP burn.

instructions.name: inventory_finalize_sale
docs: Permissionless. Closes a sold inventory `RebornEntry` once the
asset's owner is no longer `inventory_pda` (verified on-chain).

instructions.name: join_bets
docs: Join a round by placing one or more faction-direction bets.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: No seeds/bump in derive macro to keep `JoinBets` stack under 4KB.

accounts.name: game_session
docs: GameSession PDA for the current round (must be initialized by crank function)

accounts.name: user_game_bet
docs: UserGameBet PDA for this user's bet in this round

accounts.name: user_war_bets
docs: Per-user, per-cycle bets PDA. Created lazily on the user's first bet
of the cycle (init_if_needed), then read+mutated on subsequent bets and
at round claim time.

accounts.name: referrer_rewards
docs: Referrer's commission account. Required when the betting player has a referrer
(`player_data.referral_code != system_program`); the SDK derives the PDA via
`[REFERRAL_REWARDS_SEED, player_data.referral_code]` and passes it here.
Optional only for unreferred players.

instructions.name: list_user_nft
docs: User wraps `degenbtc_market::list_nft` and atomically registers the
listing into the floor queue.

instructions.name: rebirth_hashbeast
docs: Rebirth a HashBeast: claim accumulated_val, transfer the NFT into the
global inventory pool for lootbox distribution, or burn it when the
country queue/inventory is full or the rebirth cap is reached.

accounts.name: hashbeast_metadata
docs: Existing HashBeast metadata account. Mutated in-place (multiplier, xp,
accumulated_val reset to fresh-start values). NOT closed — the same
metadata follows the asset to its next owner.

accounts.name: hashbeast_asset
docs: during the TransferV1 CPI. Currently owned by `user`; becomes owned by
`inventory_pda` after this instruction.

accounts.name: hashbeast_config
docs: Read-only config that pins the canonical HashBeast collection.

accounts.name: hashbeast_collection
docs: mpl-core helper API, but the handler requires Some and Anchor
address-checks it against HashBeastConfig.

accounts.name: inventory_pool
docs: Global inventory pool — counters bumped here. Same PDA acts as the
new owner of the reborn mpl-core asset (custody).

accounts.name: inventory_pda
docs: rewritten to this address by the transfer CPI. It is the *same* PDA
as `inventory_pool` (we just need a separate AccountInfo binding for
mpl-core to see). Validated by seeds.

accounts.name: reborn_entry
docs: New per-asset entry created ONLY when the queue had space (asset was
pushed in). When the queue was full, asset is burned and this PDA is
not initialized. Manually init'd inside the handler via
`helper::init_pda_account_if_needed`.

accounts.name: lootbox_queue
docs: Country lootbox queue for the hashbeast's faction. Pushed into if there's
space; otherwise the asset is burned (no listing fallback).

instructions.name: record_floor_snapshot
docs: Permissionless. Records a daily floor anchor (median of qualifying
user-to-user sales, or queue median fallback).

accounts.name: marketplace_config
docs: InventoryPool so the first thin-volume snapshot can cap itself at the
canonical marketplace minimum price.

accounts.name: queue_median_listing
docs: Required when FloorQueue has at least one entry.

instructions.name: register_floor_listing
docs: Permissionless. Registers an existing user listing into the floor queue.

accounts.name: marketplace_listing
docs: inline via owner check + try_deserialize.

accounts.name: marketplace_escrow
docs: accepts listings whose asset is still escrow-owned, so stale raw
listing accounts cannot enter the floor queue.

instructions.name: request_hashbeast_gameplay_unlock
docs: Request gameplay hashbeast unlock. Actual withdrawal is only available in the next faction_war cycle.

instructions.name: set_hashbeast_free_mint_allowance
docs: Set or update a user's free HashBeast mint allowance (admin only).
The user still pays transaction fees and account rent, but not the mint price.

instructions.name: set_pause
docs: Authority-only kill switch. When paused, the contract blocks new bets
(manual + autominer), new round starts, and hashbeast mints/breeds. Round
settlement, claims, staking, and economy cranks remain available so
players can always exit and pending rounds always finish.

instructions.name: set_raydium_pool_state
docs: Set the Raydium pool state address (admin only)
Security: Prevents using malicious pools for swaps
Also initializes sol_rewards_vault and sol_prize_pot_vault if not already initialized

instructions.name: settle_round
docs: DONE -::- Finalize round staking, global jackpot settlement, and faction-war mining.

accounts.name: faction_state
docs: Winning faction state for updating staker rewards.
Validated manually against the winning faction ID and canonical
`[FACTION_STATE_SEED, supported_factions[winning_faction_id]]` PDA.

accounts.name: sol_prize_pot_vault
docs: winning faction has no active stakers, because winner claims are paid
from this vault.

accounts.name: war_config
docs: Faction-war config (mut for auto-settle + auto-start)

accounts.name: dbtc_mining
docs: Read-only. Lets settle_round check if the LP-burn threshold has
already been crossed and lazily capture `cycle_end_round_id` for
the rare edge case where lp_ops crossed before the cycle's first
round started.

instructions.name: settle_war
docs: DONE -::- Settle faction_war: finalize gameplay-score rankings and compute reward pools.
Permissionless -- anyone can call once the economy cycle's LP burn has completed.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Needed to read reward/evolution tuning for `finalize_war_settlement`.

accounts.name: faction_war_sol_vault
docs: sol_treasury at settle. Seeds validated implicitly via the cached bump
on `war_config.rewards_sol_vault_bump` used for the CPI signer.

accounts.name: sol_treasury
docs: Same PDA that receives protocol-fee SOL from user bets.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone can settle — no authority check needed.

instructions.name: simulate_purchase_cost
docs: Simulate mint costs for multiple hashbeasts accounting for bonding curve pricing
# Parameters
- `hashbeast_config`: HashBeastConfig account
- `hashbeast_mint_config`: HashBeastMintConfig account
- `mint_count`: Number of hashbeasts to mint

instructions.name: snapshot_price
docs: INSTRUCTION 1: Take a price snapshot (can be called by anyone every 30 minutes)
Performs a small SOL → MINE_BTC swap for price discovery and earnmarks SOL for POL
After 8 snapshots over 4 hours, call update_rate then add_lp_and_burn to finalize

accounts.name: raydium_program
docs: `raydium_cp_swap::ID` so a malicious program can't receive our CPI
(which signs with the `authority_pda` PDA) and drain program-owned
token accounts.

accounts.name: dbtc_token_account
docs: MINE_BTC token vault (main vault - same as used in initialize_mining)

accounts.name: sol_mint
docs: — defense-in-depth: Raydium's pool already validates mints against its
vaults, but pinning the address here removes the chance of confusion if
the gating `raydium_pool_state` ever changes.

accounts.name: token_program_2022
docs: Token-2022 program for MINE_BTC

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard token program for SOL

accounts.name: buybacks_account
docs: Buybacks tracking account (required)

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program (required for SOL transfers)

instructions.name: stake_degenbtc
docs: Stake degenBTC tokens to earn SOL and degenBTC rewards

accounts.name: user_dbtc_account
docs: User's degenBTC token account

accounts.name: dbtc_custodian
docs: Token-2022 account that holds staked MINE_BTC for this faction

accounts.name: authority
docs: User who is staking tokens

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for creating accounts

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program for SPL-22 token operations

instructions.name: stake_hashbeast
docs: Stake a HashBeast to boost hashpower (if faction matches player's faction)

accounts.name: hashbeast_config
docs: Read-only — anchors the `hashbeast_collection` address constraint to
the canonical collection set by admin.

accounts.name: hashbeast_asset
docs: Metaplex Core asset (source of truth for ownership)

accounts.name: hashbeast_collection
docs: Collection account for the HashBeast. Address-pinned to the official
Core collection recorded in `hashbeast_config.hashbeast_collection`
— without this binding, callers could mint NFT assets outside the
canonical collection, breaking identity / royalties / marketplace
gating. Kept `Option` (rather than required) only to preserve the
existing SDK signature; mint handlers add a runtime `require!(...)`
that the collection is present.

accounts.name: hashbeast_custody_pda
docs: PDA that holds custody of locked NFTs

instructions.name: stake_lp_tokens
docs: Stake LP tokens to earn SOL and degenBTC rewards

accounts.name: user_lp_account
docs: User's LP token account

accounts.name: liquidity_custodian
docs: Token account that holds staked LP tokens for this faction

accounts.name: authority
docs: User who is staking tokens

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for creating accounts

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for SPL token operations

instructions.name: start_round
docs: DONE -::- Start a new round and initialize its GameSession.
round_id should be current_round_id + 1 (validated in the function)

accounts.name: war_state
docs: Active cycle's FactionWarState. Seeds are checked against the
current war_id; account must exist (it's created by
`initialize_war_internal`) and be in stage 0 (active).
Enforces that `init_war` ran before any rounds can start — otherwise
`settle_round` would later fail PDA seed validation against a
non-existent war_state, stranding the round in stage 1.

instructions.name: stop_autominer
docs: Stop autominer and refund remaining SOL

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority (must be owner)

instructions.name: sweep_floor_lowest
docs: Permissionless. Buys the cheapest user listing in the floor queue and
disposes (queue / relist / burn) in the same tx. Self-cleans stale
queue entries.

accounts.name: reborn_entry
docs: New entry created on queue/relist paths. PDA seeds enforced; payload
init'd manually inside the handler.

accounts.name: hashbeast_metadata
docs: HashBeast metadata (read for faction_id / quality_score).

accounts.name: lootbox_queue
docs: Country lootbox queue for this asset's faction.

accounts.name: marketplace_listing
docs: path C. Address must match floor_queue.entries[0].listing.

instructions.name: switch_hashbeast_mining
docs: Toggle HashBeast NFT minting on/off (admin only)
Flips is_active between true and false.

instructions.name: unstake_degenbtc

types.name: AutominerInitialized
docs: Event emitted when an autominer vault is initialized

types.name: AutominerStopped
docs: Event emitted when autominer is stopped

types.name: AutominerUpdated
docs: Event emitted when autominer is initialized

types.name: AutominerVault
docs: Autominer Vault PDA (Seed: `[b"autominer", user_pubkey]`)
Stores autominer configuration for a user; funds are held in the global autominer custody PDA
Allows users to configure automatic faction-direction betting.

fields.name: factions_config
docs: Factions configuration (specific list or random count with direction) - optional

fields.name: sol_per_round
docs: SOL reserved per round.
- SOL mode: total round budget, including keeper compensation plus generated bets.
- Ticket mode: must be 0; a fixed keeper reserve is deposited per round.

fields.name: rounds_remaining
docs: Number of rounds remaining (decremented after each round)

fields.name: last_bet_round_id
docs: Last round ID where bets were placed (to prevent duplicate bets)

fields.name: sol_balance
docs: Remaining SOL balance reserved for this autominer (held in autominer custody PDA)

fields.name: can_reload
docs: If set to true, SOL rewards can be used to reload Autominer and continue mining degenBTC

fields.name: use_ticket
docs: Optional ticket tier index. If Some, autominer uses tickets for bet points.
Ticket mode still reserves SOL upfront to compensate the keeper for each execution.
Bet amount is determined by the ticket value in player_data.free_tickets[tier].

fields.name: pending_autominer_claims
docs: Autominer-placed bets that haven't been claimed yet. Incremented in
`execute_autominer_bet` after a successful bet, decremented in
`claim_autominer_rewards`. When this hits 0 in claim, that claim is the
last unclaimed bet of the current funded cycle → bulk-reload trigger.

fields.name: accrued_reload_sol
docs: SOL rewards won during the current funded cycle, parked in
`autominer_custody`, awaiting bulk-conversion to additional rounds on
the final claim. Refunded to owner on `stop_autominer`.

types.name: BetType
docs: Bet type enum for user bets.
Each bet selects a faction and a direction for the active faction_war.

types.name: BetsPlaced
docs: Event emitted when bets are placed (single, batch, or autominer)

fields.name: total_cycle_sol_split
docs: Total SOL deducted from this batch for the cycle SOL split (faction war vault).

types.name: BuybacksAccount
docs: Buybacks account that accumulates SOL for token buybacks

fields.name: total_sol_accumulated
docs: Total SOL accumulated for buybacks (in lamports)

fields.name: sol_for_pol
docs: SOL earmarked for Protocol Owned Liquidity (in lamports)

types.name: CreatorInput
docs: Helper type for passing creators from client

fields.name: percentage
docs: Whole-percent share (`100` = 100%). Sum must equal the percentage denominator.

types.name: CycleEndRoundSnapshotted
docs: Emitted by `add_lp_and_burn` when an LP operation pushes
`lp_operations_count` past `settle_at_lp_op_count` and the current cycle's
final round_id is snapshotted onto `FactionWarConfig.cycle_end_round_id`.
Lets indexers know the active cycle is now in its final round — no new
rounds will start until settle_war runs.

types.name: DbtcRewardsClaimed
docs: Event emitted when a user withdraws gameplay-earned degenBTC token rewards.

fields.name: dbtc_stakers_pct
docs: Whole-percent share of degenBTC emission that goes to stakers. `100` = 100%.

fields.name: dbtc_winners_pct
docs: Whole-percent share of degenBTC emission that goes to winning faction bettors. `100` = 100%.

fields.name: dbtc_same_faction_pct
docs: Whole-percent share of degenBTC emission that goes to each non-winning
direction on the winning faction. With 3 total directions, up to two
losing directions may each receive this share if they have bettors.

fields.name: dbtc_jackpot_pct
docs: Whole-percent share of degenBTC emission that goes to the global jackpot. `100` = 100%.

fields.name: hodl_tax_pct
docs: Whole-percent HODL tax charged on degenBTC reward withdrawal.
`100` = 100%. Paid by paper hands; redistributed to remaining diamond
hands via `HodlPool::hodl_tax_index` (closed loop — no vault drain).

types.name: DegenBtcMining
docs: HashBeast-BTC Mining status and parameters

fields.name: dbtc_token_vault
docs: Token vault that holds all pre-minted tokens

fields.name: dbtc_per_round
docs: degenBTC mined per slot (original base rate)

fields.name: total_tokens_mined
docs: Total tokens mined so far

fields.name: total_tokens_distributed
docs: Total tokens distributed so far

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA derivation

fields.name: vault_auth_bump

fields.name: raydium_pool_state

fields.name: last_rate_update

fields.name: price_history

fields.name: recent_price
docs: Recent price (last snapshot, used for comparison)

fields.name: track_price
docs: Track price (price when last rate change actually happened)

fields.name: pol_stats
docs: Protocol Owned Liquidity tracking

fields.name: lp_token_price_in_sol
docs: LP token price in SOL (9-decimal precision, updated during oracle updates)

fields.name: price_change_threshold
docs: Price change threshold percentage (e.g., 3 = 3%) - rate changes only if price moves beyond this

fields.name: emission_increase_pct
docs: Emission increase percentage when price goes up (e.g., 1 = 1% increase)

fields.name: emission_decrease_pct
docs: Emission decrease percentage when price goes down (e.g., 3 = 3% decrease)

fields.name: lp_operation_pending
docs: Flag indicating LP operation is pending after rate update

fields.name: total_degenbtc_hashpower
docs: Hashpower denominator used to compute the emitted reward indexes.

types.name: FactionState
docs: Faction State PDA (Seed: `[b"faction", faction_name.as_bytes()]`)
Tracks cumulative statistics and reward indexes for a specific faction.
One account per faction (up to MAX_FACTIONS factions).
Used for calculating staker rewards based on faction performance.

fields.name: faction_id
docs: The faction ID (matching index in supported_factions)

fields.name: total_degenbtc_hashpower
docs: Total passive hashpower from stakers in this faction (cumulative)

fields.name: hashbeasts_playing
docs: Total hashbeasts currently being used in gameplay

types.name: FactionTreasuryRewardsClaimed
docs: Event emitted when a faction claims treasury rewards for a settled faction_war.

types.name: FactionWarCloseState
docs: Upgrade-safe close tracker for a faction-war cycle.
Tracks the rent payer for `FactionWarState` + `FactionWarSettlement`, plus
live child accounts that must close first. The child counters are maintained
in sidecars so existing mainnet war/state accounts do not need a layout
migration.

types.name: FactionWarConfig
docs: Faction War configuration PDA (Seed: `[b"faction-war-config"]`)
Faction wars are tied to the economy cycle: one faction war per LP-burn cycle.
Settlement becomes possible once lp_operations_count reaches settle_at_lp_op_count.

fields.name: current_war_id
docs: Current faction-war ID (incrementing counter, starts at 1)

fields.name: rewards_sol_vault_bump
docs: Cached PDA bump for `war_sol_vault`. Stored here so the hot
JoinBets path can derive the vault address with `create_program_address`
instead of paying `find_program_address` every bet.

fields.name: settle_at_lp_op_count
docs: The LP operations count that triggers settlement of the current faction_war.
Set to `pol_stats.lp_operations_count + 1` when the faction_war starts,
meaning the faction_war settles after the next full economy cycle completes.

fields.name: prev_ranks
docs: Rankings from the previous faction war's gameplay scores.
Used as start_ranks when the next faction war auto-starts.
Initialized to [0, 1, 2, ..., NUM_FACTIONS-1] on first setup.

fields.name: last_processed_round_id
docs: Last round whose round-completion side effects were applied to this cycle.

fields.name: cycle_end_round_id
docs: Round id snapshotted by the LP-burn instruction when
`lp_operations_count` first reaches `settle_at_lp_op_count`. Marks the
final round of the current cycle — any round after this one belongs to
the next war. `0` while the cycle is still open.
Lifecycle:
- LP burn captures `global_game_state.current_round_id` here once the
threshold crosses.
- `start_round` is blocked once this is non-zero (war must be settled
before a new round can begin).
- `settle_war` requires this to be non-zero AND
`last_processed_round_id == cycle_end_round_id` (boundary round
already folded into war_state).
- Stays non-zero after `finalize_war_settlement` so `start_round`
remains blocked until `initialize_war_internal` creates the next
war PDAs, then resets to `0` there so the next war starts fresh.

fields.name: sol_volume_since_last_win
docs: Per-country additive SOL volume accumulated since each country's last
round win. Resets to 0 for the winner inside
`track_war_round_completion` AFTER snapshotting onto
`GameSession.winning_faction_volume_at_round`. Persists across cycle
boundaries — a country in a long drought builds up potential.

fields.name: mining_multiplier_bps
docs: Current multiplier for faction-war degenBTC rewards, in basis points.
10_000 = 1.0x. Applied to `total_dbtc_mined_in_rounds` at settlement.

fields.name: multiplier_increase_bps
docs: Basis-point increase applied when price goes up (e.g. 300 = +3%).

fields.name: multiplier_decrease_bps
docs: Basis-point decrease applied when price goes down (e.g. 1000 = -10%).

fields.name: multiplier_min_bps
docs: Hard floor for the multiplier (min protocol cap: 1000 = 0.1x).

fields.name: multiplier_max_bps
docs: Hard ceiling for the multiplier (max protocol cap: 30000 = 3.0x).

types.name: FactionWarRewardsClaimed
docs: Event emitted when a user claims faction_war rewards. dBTC amounts are
per-lane (base + mvp + hb = reward_amount). SOL is broken out the same way
so the indexer can attribute earnings to predict/perform/mvp activity.

types.name: FactionWarSettled
docs: Event emitted when a faction_war is settled.
Rankings driven by on-chain gameplay scores accumulated during the faction_war.

fields.name: sol_base_pool
docs: SOL lane allocations (sum across eligibles). Per-user SOL share at
claim time scales each by `user_dbtc_lane / total_dbtc_lane`.

fields.name: undistributed_sol
docs: SOL drained to sol_treasury because no eligible claimant existed for
that rank/lane slot (e.g. faction had no winners on resolved direction,
no mutations, or no MVP).

fields.name: mvp_bonus
docs: Per-faction MVP dBTC bonus (zero where mvp_user[fid] == default).

fields.name: mvp_user
docs: Per-faction MVP user (default pubkey = no MVP this cycle).

fields.name: mvp_score
docs: Per-faction winning MVP score.

fields.name: faction_mutation_scores
docs: Per-faction HashBeast mutation-score denominator for HB bonus claims.

types.name: FactionWarSettlement
docs: Faction War settlement PDA (Seed: `[b"faction-war-settlement", war_id_u64_le]`)
Holds all settlement-only data computed when a faction war ends.
Loaded by settle_war and claim_war_rewards — NOT by join_bets or settle_round.

fields.name: war_id
docs: FactionWar ID (must match the corresponding FactionWarState)

fields.name: final_ranks
docs: Final ranks derived from the gameplay-score array at settlement.

fields.name: rank_deltas
docs: Rank deltas at settlement (positive = rank improved, negative = rank worsened).

fields.name: resolved_directions
docs: Resolved direction per faction (0=Down, 1=Neutral, 2=Up).

fields.name: mvp_bonus
docs: Bonus amount reserved for each faction's MVP at settlement.

fields.name: base_reward_pools
docs: Pre-computed base reward pool per faction (rank-weighted across factions,
then shared by anyone who picked that country's resolved direction correctly).

fields.name: hashbeast_reward_pools
docs: Reward pool per faction reserved for gameplay HashBeasts backing their home country during the faction_war.

fields.name: sol_base_pool
docs: SOL lane allocations (mirror of the dBTC lanes — same bps). Per-user
SOL payout at claim time scales each lane's pool by the user's dBTC
share of that lane:
user_sol_<lane> = sol_<lane>_pool * user_dbtc_<lane> / total_dbtc_<lane>
Distribution is **absolute rank-weighted**: each active faction's slice
of every lane is determined by its rank weight relative to the sum of
rank weights across all active factions. Non-eligible factions' slices
are NOT redistributed to other factions; they stay unallocated.
`sol_base_pool + sol_hb_pool + sol_mvp_pool + undistributed_sol ==
FactionWarState.sol_reward_pool` at settle time.

fields.name: undistributed_sol
docs: SOL that no eligible claimant can claim (no faction met the lane's
eligibility rule, or the rank-weight slot belonged to a faction with
no eligibles). Transferred to `sol_treasury` at settle so it doesn't
rot in the faction-war SOL vault.

fields.name: treasury_claimed_bitmap
docs: Bitmap of factions that have already claimed treasury rewards for this
faction war. Bit N = 1 means faction N has claimed.

types.name: FactionWarStarted
docs: Emitted by `initialize_war_internal` when a new cycle's FactionWarState
PDA is created. Lets indexers detect cycle starts without scanning ix data.

fields.name: settle_at_lp_op_count
docs: LP-operations count threshold; once `pol_stats.lp_operations_count`
reaches this, the LP-burn ix snapshots the cycle's final round.

fields.name: treasury_reward_base_amount
docs: Treasury-tax SOL seeded at war start (rolled forward from
`tax_config.unassigned_war_treasury_amount`).

types.name: FactionWarState
docs: Faction War state PDA (Seed: `[b"faction-war", war_id_u64_le]`)
Tracks active gameplay data during a faction war cycle.
Kept small because it is loaded on every bet and every settle_round.

fields.name: war_id
docs: FactionWar ID

fields.name: start_timestamp
docs: Timestamp when this faction_war was started

fields.name: stage
docs: Stage: 0 = active, 1 = settled (claims open)

fields.name: faction_count
docs: Snapshot of how many factions were active when this faction_war started

fields.name: total_dbtc_mined_in_rounds
docs: Total degenBTC mined via raffle rounds during this faction_war.

fields.name: dbtc_mined_this_war
docs: Faction-war mining pool distributed to faction-war predictors.

fields.name: faction_direction_totals
docs: Total weighted bets per faction and direction during this faction_war
from all users. This powers the base "be right anywhere" cycle rewards.

fields.name: round_wins
docs: Number of raffle rounds won by each faction during this faction war.
Used as a tiebreak after story score.

fields.name: total_cycle_sol
docs: Total real SOL volume across all factions/directions for this war.
Folded once per round from `game_session.total_sol_bets`. Used as the
`total_sol` denominator in the claim-time mutation chance roll.

fields.name: gameplay_scores
docs: Accumulated gameplay scores per faction during this faction_war.
Drives ranking at settlement (round wins is the tiebreak, then faction_id).

fields.name: mvp_user
docs: Running MVP candidate per faction (user with highest cumulative gameplay score).

fields.name: mvp_score
docs: Running MVP score per faction.

fields.name: faction_mutation_score
docs: Total mutation-bonus score per faction across all users this cycle.
Incremented in `apply_mutation_bonus_score` alongside per-user totals.
Denominator for HB bonus claim share — `hb_share[user] =
hb_pool[home] * user_mutation_score / faction_mutation_score[home]`.
HB lane is now purely gameplay-driven: you must have rolled at least
one successful mutation this cycle to earn HB-bonus.

fields.name: sol_reward_pool
docs: Accumulated SOL (from `cycle_sol_split`) reserved for this faction-war
cycle's SOL jackpot. Distributed to claimants at settlement.

fields.name: treasury_reward_base_amount
docs: Exact amount of faction treasury tax attributed to this faction war.
Accumulated during tax distribution while the war is active, or
seeded from TaxConfig.unassigned_war_treasury_amount when the
war state is first initialized.

types.name: FactionsConfig
docs: Autominer configuration for factions

types.name: FloorEntry
docs: One entry in the on-chain sorted-floor queue. Tracks a user-listed asset
(program-owned listings are explicitly excluded — sweep buying the
protocol's own listings would be circular). Stale entries (listing was
canceled directly via the marketplace, bypassing our `cancel_user_listing`
wrapper that would have atomic-deregistered) are popped one at a time
by `sweep_floor_lowest`; the keeper bounty for that purge is the
`STALE_PURGE_KEEPER_REWARD_LAMPORTS` constant, set deliberately low to
defuse list→raw-cancel→purge spam attacks. See that constant's docs.

types.name: FloorEntryRegistered
docs: A user (or keeper) registered a marketplace listing into the floor queue.

types.name: FloorEntryRemoved
docs: A floor queue entry was removed (sale, cancel, price-update reorder, or stale).

types.name: FloorHistory
docs: Singleton 7-entry rolling buffer of daily floor anchors.
`compute_trend_bps` reads the head vs. the (head+1) wrap-around to get a
7-day delta in basis points.
Seeds: `[b"floor-history"]`.

types.name: FloorQueue
docs: Singleton sorted-ascending queue of the cheapest user listings.
Invariants: `entries[..entries_count]` is sorted ascending by `price`.
Seeds: `[b"floor-queue"]`.

types.name: FloorSnapshot
docs: One entry in the 7-day rolling floor snapshot ringbuffer.

types.name: FloorSnapshotRecorded
docs: A daily floor snapshot was committed.

fields.name: source
docs: 0 = sale median, 1 = queue median fallback, 2 = sale capped by queue,
3 = first snapshot capped to marketplace min, 4 = capped by prior anchor.

types.name: FloorSweepExecuted
docs: Inventory PDA bought the cheapest user-listed NFT via `sweep_floor_lowest`.
Disposition is reflected in a follow-up event (LootboxQueuePush,
InventoryAssetRelisted, or InventoryAssetBurned).

types.name: GamePauseToggled
docs: Emitted when the authority toggles the global pause flag.
Indexers should propagate `is_paused` to the frontend so the UI can
disable bet/mint actions and show a clear "paused" banner to users.

types.name: GameSession
docs: Game Session PDA (Seed: `[b"game-session", round_id_u64]`)
Each round has its own GameSession PDA that tracks:
- Round timing (start/end timestamps)
- Total bets placed in this round
- Per-faction indexes for tracking individual bets
- Winning faction
- Round-specific reward pools and payout data
This account is created when a round starts and finalized when the round ends.

fields.name: round_id
docs: The round ID this session belongs to

fields.name: round_start_slot
docs: Slot when the round started.

fields.name: round_end_timestamp
docs: Timestamp after which betting is closed.

fields.name: scheduled_entropy_slot
docs: Primary future slot whose hash should be used as round entropy.

fields.name: entropy_slot_used
docs: Actual slot whose hash was used to derive the winner.

fields.name: entropy_hash
docs: Stored slot hash used for winner derivation.

fields.name: used_entropy_fallback
docs: Whether the round had to fall back to latest-available slot hash instead of the scheduled one.

fields.name: total_sol_bets
docs: Total SOL bets placed in this round

fields.name: total_points_bets
docs: Total points bets placed in this round

fields.name: total_wgtd_points_bets
docs: Total weighted points bets (for degenBTC distribution)

fields.name: stakers_fee
docs: Total stakers fee paid in this round

fields.name: cycle_sol_pool
docs: SOL added to the war's cycle-SOL pot this round (sum of
`cycle_sol_split_per_bet × num_bets` across every bet in this round).
Folded into `war_state.sol_reward_pool` at settle_round via
`track_war_round_completion`. Lets us track the cycle SOL pool without
loading war_state on the bet hot path.

fields.name: user_faction_indexes
docs: Number of users who bet on each faction.

fields.name: sol_bets_by_faction
docs: Net SOL bet placed on each faction.

fields.name: points_bets_by_faction_direction
docs: Points bet placed on each faction-direction pair.

fields.name: wgtd_points_bets_by_faction_direction
docs: Weighted points bet placed on each faction-direction pair.

fields.name: winning_faction_id
docs: The winning faction ID for this round.

fields.name: winning_direction
docs: The winning direction for the winning faction (0=Down, 1=Neutral, 2=Up).

fields.name: dbtc_winner_pool
docs: degenBTC allocated for exact winning faction+direction bettors in this round.

fields.name: dbtc_same_faction_direction_pools
docs: degenBTC allocated per losing direction on the winning faction.
The winning direction index remains zero in this array.

fields.name: faction_stakers
docs: degenBTC allocated for stakers in this round

fields.name: jackpot_rewards
docs: degenBTC allocated for the global jackpot in this round.

fields.name: sol_rewards_index
docs: SOL rewards index for this round's exact winning faction+direction.

fields.name: dbtc_rewards_index
docs: degenBTC rewards index for this round's exact winning faction+direction.

fields.name: jackpot_hit
docs: Whether the global jackpot was hit in this round.

fields.name: jackpot_faction_id
docs: The faction ID that wins the global jackpot this round (if hit).

fields.name: jackpot_pot_size_on_hit
docs: Global jackpot pot size when hit (if applicable).

fields.name: jackpot_rewards_index
docs: degenBTC rewards index for jackpot winners (all directions on jackpot faction).
Set during `settle_round`; read by `claim_round_rewards`.

fields.name: mutations_per_faction
docs: Number of mutations that have occurred per faction this round.
More mutations in a faction → harder for the next one (diminishing returns).

fields.name: total_mutations_this_round
docs: Total mutations across all factions this round.
Capped at active_factions / 3 to create scarcity.

fields.name: war_id_when_played
docs: Snapshot of `war_config.current_war_id` at round start.
Used by the round-claim handler to detect late claims (cycle has settled
after the round ended) so mutation-bonus score is dropped instead of
being applied to a different cycle.

fields.name: winning_faction_volume_at_round
docs: Snapshot of the winning country's `sol_volume_since_last_win`
captured at round-end (in `track_war_round_completion`),
BEFORE the config counter is reset to 0. Frozen value the round-claim
mutation roll feeds into the volume_factor — late claims see the same
number even though the config-side counter has long been reset.

fields.name: sol_reward_pool_accumulated
docs: Accumulated cycle SOL split from bets placed during this round.
Folded into `FactionWarState.sol_reward_pool` once per round at
`settle_round` rather than touched per-bet — keeps JoinBets fast.

types.name: GameplayScoreAccumulated
docs: Cycle leaderboard score-add event. Emitted from two sites:
- `score_source = GAMEPLAY_SCORE_SOURCE_ROUND_WIN (0)`: end-of-round
accumulation when a country wins. `score_added` equals the round's
total weighted points bet on that country (any direction).
- `score_source = GAMEPLAY_SCORE_SOURCE_JACKPOT_HIT (2)`: jackpot
accumulation when the independently selected jackpot country actually
receives the pot. `score_added` equals the round's total weighted points
bet on that jackpot country (any direction).
- `score_source = GAMEPLAY_SCORE_SOURCE_MUTATION_BONUS (1)`: per-claim
bonus when a player's round-claim mutation roll succeeds and the
round's cycle is still active. Full bonus is
`user_wgtd_points_on_winner × active_multiplier / BASE_MULTIPLIER × mutation_weight`
where `mutation_weight` is 4/2/1 for Evolution/Power/Trait.
`score_added` reflects the **leaderboard delta actually applied**:
the full bonus if the user backed their own home faction, or **half**
the bonus if the user was playing mercenary on a foreign winner.
Only home-win mutations also affect MVP candidacy and HB-bonus pools.

types.name: GameplayTuningConfig
docs: Unified gameplay tuning stored directly inside `GlobalConfig`.

fields.name: rpg_progression
docs: Enable RPG progression (story events, XP, etc) during gameplay.

fields.name: max_evolution_stage_unlocked
docs: Highest evolution stage currently unlocked by admin.
`0` disables evolutions entirely, `1` allows stage 0 -> 1, etc.

fields.name: war_base_reward_bps
docs: Faction-war mining pool split in basis points. Must sum to 10_000.

fields.name: base_mutation_chance_bps
docs: Baseline mutation chance before runtime factors.

fields.name: mutation_chance_floor_bps
docs: Final chance floor / cap after all runtime factors are applied.

fields.name: faction_volume_threshold_lamports
docs: Per-faction additive volume controller. Required volume base (and
per-mutation ramp) for the country's accumulated SOL bets since its
last round win to fully unlock the volume_factor in the chance formula.

fields.name: target_mutations_per_cycle
docs: Cycle pacing controller. Pacing factor alone regulates how many
mutations land per cycle — it's a closed-loop controller comparing
observed-vs-target. No separate cooldown controller needed.

types.name: GlobalConfig
docs: Global configuration for the program

fields.name: total_players
docs: total number of players in the game

fields.name: ext_authority
docs: Authority that can update config parameters

fields.name: pending_authority

fields.name: fee_recipient

fields.name: pda_sol_treasury
docs: PDA account that holds collected SOL fees

fields.name: supported_factions
docs: List of supported factions (e.g., "USA", "China", "Russia")
Maximum 12 factions, each with max 16 characters

fields.name: sol_fee_config
docs: SOL fee distribution configuration

fields.name: dbtc_dist_config
docs: degenBTC distribution configuration

fields.name: raydium_pool_state
docs: Authorized Raydium pool state address (security: prevents using malicious pools)

fields.name: snapshot_interval
docs: Minimum time interval between price snapshots (in seconds)
Default: 1800 seconds (30 minutes)

fields.name: gameplay_tuning
docs: Unified gameplay and cycle-reward tuning surface.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Authority-toggleable global pause. When true, blocks: new bets (manual
+ autominer), new round starts, hashbeast mints, and hashbeast breeds. Does NOT
block: round settlement, all claims, staking/unstaking, economy cranks.
Users can always exit; pending rounds always finish.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for GlobalConfig PDA derivation

fields.name: treasury_bump
docs: Bump for SOL treasury PDA derivation

types.name: GlobalGameSate
docs: Global game state PDA (Seed: `[b"global-game-state"]`)
Tracks global game statistics and the currently active round.
Each individual round has its own GameSession PDA.

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether the game is currently active

fields.name: current_round_id
docs: The currently active round ID (e.g., 48636).

fields.name: round_duration_seconds
docs: Round duration in seconds (configurable)

fields.name: last_round_id
docs: The last completed round ID

fields.name: jackpot_pot
docs: Global jackpot pot that accumulates across all rounds and factions.
When the jackpot hits, this pot is distributed to any-direction bettors on the selected faction.

types.name: HashBeastConfig
docs: Global HashBeast configuration used outside the primary mint sale.
Seeds: `[b"hashbeast-config"]`. Singleton. Initialized once at deploy
(admin path) and mutated only via admin ix going forward.
**No lifetime supply cap.** Only the genesis sale is bounded (see
`HashBeastMintConfig.genesis_mint_limit`). Post-genesis, HashBeasts mint
via breeding without a hard ceiling; parent breed-count pricing plus the
floor guard make additional supply progressively expensive.
**`hashbeast_collection` is the trust anchor** for "this asset is a
canonical HashBeast" — every mint/breed Accounts struct address-pins the
`hashbeast_collection` field to this pubkey, every stake/use/withdraw
path resolves the same constraint. Don't add a new entry point that
touches a HashBeast asset without binding the collection. See
`instructions/hashbeasts.rs` module docs for the full mint-flow guard.

fields.name: hashbeast_collection
docs: Canonical Metaplex Core collection address for HashBeasts. Set once
at admin init; mint paths refuse any other collection.

fields.name: total_hashbeasts_minted
docs: Lifetime count of HashBeasts ever minted. Burns do NOT decrement this.

fields.name: breeding_allowed
docs: Admin kill-switch. When false, `breed_hashbeasts` reverts.

fields.name: breed_parent_prices_lamports
docs: Per-parent prices by current breed_count. Valid indexes are 0..=4.
Pair price = mom table price + dad table price, then the floor guard is
applied. Admin-updatable so governance can retune the sink.

types.name: HashBeastEvolution
docs: Event emitted when a hashbeast evolves to a new stage

fields.name: origin
docs: 0 = round claim, 1 = faction-war claim.

fields.name: visual_trait_index
docs: Visual trait mutation that happened during evolution

fields.name: power_trait_index
docs: Power trait mutation that happened during evolution

The whitelisted user still pays transaction/account rent, but not the mint fee.

types.name: HashBeastGameplayUnlockRequested

fields.name: base_price

fields.name: curve_a

fields.name: genesis_mints_by_faction
docs: Genesis mints completed per faction/country.

fields.name: ticket_tiers

types.name: HashBeastPowerMutation

fields.name: origin

types.name: HashpowerConfig
docs: Hashpower configuration for the Minebtc program

Event emitted when a user pays the HODL tax ("HODL Tax") and it gets
